plan.title: DEFT Evolution — User Tiers & Role-Based Access Control
plan.author: interview-agent

narratives.Overview: Implements 6 user tiers with tier-specific home screens, global content spaces, a rule-based access control enforcement layer, an AI chatbot with live agent handoff, and home screen widget customization. All content (docs, forums, support tickets, leads) is modeled as tagged threads in four global spaces (global-docs, global-forum, global-support, global-leads).
narratives.Background: The platform currently has no RBAC enforcement. All authenticated users see identical interfaces. This module adds server-side tier resolution, route protection, role-aware home screens, and a chatbot that captures anonymous leads and hands off to live agents.
narratives.Constraint: Tier resolution MUST be server-side. Public routes (global-docs, global-forum reads) MUST NOT require authentication. The chatbot widget MUST load asynchronously. ≥85% test coverage required on all new code.
narratives.Risk: Clerk anonymous token promotion is novel; requires careful Clerk webhook handling. Cross-org support ticket visibility (global-support filtered by org_id) must not leak data between orgs. Chatbot RAG requires indexing global-docs content.
narratives.Alternative: Considered separate DEFT orgs per department (rejected: single DEFT org with spaces is simpler). Considered tag-only content model (rejected: four named global spaces gives clearer permission boundaries). Considered user-selectable tier at login (rejected: highest-privilege-wins is simpler and unambiguous).

decisions.tier_order: platform_admin > deft_org_member > customer_org_admin > customer_org_member > registered_user > anonymous
decisions.deft_org_structure: single 'deft' org with three department spaces: deft-sales, deft-support, deft-finance
decisions.cross_org_visibility: four global spaces with org_id filtering for support tickets; leads visible to DEFT org only
decisions.chatbot: AI-first with live agent handoff via IO channels; Clerk anonymous token for unauthenticated users
decisions.anonymous_identity: Clerk anonymous session promoted to full account on registration; prior sessions linked
decisions.home_screen_customization: show/hide and reorder widgets; preferences stored server-side per user
decisions.provisioning: placeholder only in this phase; billing provider deferred
decisions.tier4_home: department-specific defaults based on deft org space membership

narrative.Overview: Schema extensions (thread_type, visibility, org_id on threads; user_home_preferences table; anon_session_id on leads), global space seeding, deft org seeding, and tier resolution service with API endpoints.

subItems.title: Add thread_type enum column to threads table (wiki|documentation|tutorial|forum|support|lead, default: forum)
Add visibility enum column to threads table (public|org-only|deft-only, default: org-only)
Add nullable org_id FK column to threads table for support ticket scoping
Add user_home_preferences table (user_id PK, tier, layout JSON)
Add nullable anon_session_id column with index to leads table
Seed four global spaces: global-docs, global-forum, global-support, global-leads (idempotent)
Seed deft org and three department spaces: deft-sales, deft-support, deft-finance (idempotent)
Implement ResolveTier(userID) Go service covering all 6 tier paths with sub-type detection
GET /api/me/tier endpoint returning tier, sub_type, org_id?, deft_department?
GET /api/me/home-preferences and PUT /api/me/home-preferences endpoints
Unit tests: TierResolver all 6 paths + edge cases. Integration tests: tier endpoint, home-preferences CRUD. Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Tier resolution React hook, Next.js middleware for route protection, public route group, Widget base component, HomeLayout grid, HomeLayoutEditor (show/hide/reorder), and useHomeLayout hook.

subItems.title: Create useTier() React hook calling /api/me/tier; anonymous returns tier 1
Update Next.js middleware.ts: block /admin/* for non-platform_admin; protect global-leads; public routes excluded
Create (public) Next.js route group for /docs/[...slug] and /forum/[...slug] with chatbot widget
Implement Widget base component and HomeLayout responsive CSS grid
Implement HomeLayoutEditor with show/hide toggles and drag-to-reorder; calls PUT /api/me/home-preferences
Implement useHomeLayout(tier) hook: fetches preferences, falls back to static tier default
Unit tests: useTier, useHomeLayout, Widget, HomeLayout, middleware routing. E2E: route protection. Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Anonymous home screen (docs/forum highlights, GetStarted CTA, chatbot) and registered developer home screen (profile, forum activity, support tickets, upgrade CTA). Plus forum post creation and support ticket creation actions for Tier 2+.

subItems.title: DocsHighlightsWidget: recent global-docs threads, public, no auth
ForumHighlightsWidget: recent global-forum threads, public, no auth
GetStartedWidget: CTA with sign-up link, visible to Tier 1 only
Compose Tier 1 home screen at / with default widget layout
MyProfileWidget: Clerk profile data, name, email, account status
MyForumActivityWidget: user's recent global-forum posts and replies
MySupportTicketsWidget: user's open global-support tickets with status badges
UpgradeCTAWidget: visible to Tier 2 only, links to upgrade flow
Compose Tier 2 home screen with default widget layout
Forum post creation for Tier 2+ in global-forum space
Support ticket creation for Tier 2+ in global-support space with org_id
Unit tests: all widgets. E2E: Tier 1 home, Tier 2 home, forum create, ticket create. Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Paying customer org member home (org overview, org-filtered support tickets) and owner variant (support dashboard, billing stub). Customer org admin home (RBAC controls, member list with role editing).

subItems.title: OrgOverviewWidget: org name, member count, plan status stub
OrgSupportTicketsWidget: global-support filtered by org_id; no cross-org leakage
BillingStatusWidget (stub): plan, renewal date; visible to org owner only
OrgSupportDashboardWidget: open/closed ticket counts for org; org owner only
Compose Tier 3 home screen: member variant and owner variant
OrgAccessControlWidget: member list with role badges, edit controls, cannot elevate above own role
OrgRBACEditorWidget: space-level role overrides per member
Compose Tier 5 home screen: RBAC controls, member list, support dashboard, billing placeholder
Unit tests: all widgets. Security: no cross-org ticket leakage. E2E: Tier 3 member/owner views, Tier 5 RBAC controls. Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: DEFT employee department-specific home screens (sales: leads pipeline; support: ticket queue; finance: billing overview) and platform admin home screen (system health, audit log, all operational widgets).

subItems.title: LeadPipelineWidget: global-leads grouped by status; DEFT sales only
RecentLeadsWidget: last 10 leads with source and anon/registered/converted status
ConversionMetricsWidget: Tier 1→2→3 funnel counts (stub data ok)
TicketQueueWidget: all open global-support tickets; DEFT support only; sortable
TicketStatsWidget: open/pending/resolved counts; avg response time stub
BillingOverviewWidget: paying org count, MRR stub; DEFT finance only
Compose Tier 4 home screens: sales/support/finance department defaults
SystemHealthWidget: API uptime, DB status, channel health summary
RecentAuditLogWidget: last 10 audit events with actor and action
Compose Tier 6 home screen: system health, audit log, user management link, feature flags link, all T4 widgets
Unit tests: all widgets. E2E: Tier 4 sales/support/finance defaults, Tier 6 full view. Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Async-loading ChatbotWidget with Clerk anonymous token support, POST /api/chat/message endpoint (stubbed AI), lead capture in chat, live agent handoff via IO channels, Clerk anonymous session promotion on registration, and RAG over global-docs.

subItems.title: ChatbotWidget: async dynamic import, Clerk anon token, floating bubble → panel; renders on all pages
POST /api/chat/message endpoint: accepts session_id + message + anon_token?; stubbed AI response; session_id persists
Lead capture: create/update lead in global-leads when user provides name/email; link anon_session_id; no duplicate leads
Live agent handoff: escalation intent → opens IO channels chat session with DEFT support space
Clerk user.created webhook: link anon_session_id to new user_id; update lead status anonymous→registered
RAG over global-docs: index threads; retrieve top-k chunks as chatbot context
Unit tests: ChatbotWidget, chat endpoint, lead capture dedup, anon promotion webhook. E2E: chatbot visible anonymously, lead created, handoff opens IO thread. Coverage ≥85%.

items.title: Phase 7: Conversion Flows & Home Screen Customization

narrative.Overview: Three Tier 2→3 conversion paths (self-service stub, sales-assisted CRM action, admin override). Full home screen customization: drag-and-drop reorder, reset-to-defaults, E2E persistence tests.

subItems.title: Self-service upgrade flow stub: Upgrade button → billing stub → creates org → Tier 3 promotion
Sales-assisted conversion: DEFT sales marks lead converted in global-leads → triggers org creation + Tier 3 promotion
Admin override in /admin/users: platform admin sets user org + paying status; audit-logged
Polish HomeLayoutEditor: drag-and-drop reorder with keyboard accessibility, ARIA labels
Reset to defaults button: clears saved preferences, restores tier default layout with dialog confirmation
E2E: widget customization persists across page reload and re-login for Tiers 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
Unit tests: all conversion flows. Security: conversion actions are audit-logged; admin override requires platform_admin. Coverage ≥85%.
